query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "beyond the current observation: evaluating multimodal large language m" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (c) and (d) as it establishes the empirical baseline and provides a foundational methodology (the MME benchmark) for evaluating Multimodal Large Language Models, which is the core domain of the user's follow-up research question. Even though it does not address the specific "Beyond the Current Observation" mechanism mentioned in the user's title, it is the canonical reference for the general evaluation of MLLMs that any literature review on this topic must cite.
